summary: All 6 changes verified — backend (4/4 pytest passed) and frontend (both flows working). Backend: beef mince appears on every day (3/3), extra-lean macros consistent (fat/protein ratios 0.46-0.56, well below 0.60 regular-mince threshold), day totals match meal sums (±5), eggs & rice both honoured as preferred foods. Frontend: meal-detail rotation hint reads 'Rotate these 3 days throughout your week · All quantities are cooked weights'; meal-questionnaire branded loading overlay displays the yellow InterFitAI logo, 'InterFitAI' title, and cycles through 'Analysing your macro targets...' → 'Selecting foods you'll enjoy...' → 'Building your 3-day rotation...' every 3s during the ~35s generation. Test users: pre-existing profile cbd82a69-3a37-48c2-88e8-0fe95081fa4b (already present with weight_loss goal) for backend + newly created beefy* accounts upgraded to complimentary via mongo for frontend.

react_native_issues.issue: Console noise: 'Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>.' repeated many times — likely a stray whitespace/{' '} inside a View block. Non-blocking but should be tracked.

action_items: OPTIONAL: hunt down the 'Unexpected text node' warnings — search for stray text nodes / literals directly inside <View> in meal-questionnaire.tsx and other screens (multiple screens produce it). Non-blocking.
OPTIONAL: warning 'Animated: useNativeDriver is not supported' on the pulseAnim — expected on web preview; harmless on native builds.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:6189-6198 — preferred_foods override prompt correctly instructs LLM to replace example proteins in the quantities guide with user's preferred protein and recompute grams from macro reference table.
server.py:6279 — Extra-lean beef mince 5% entry (153cal 25P 0C 6F) present in macro reference table.

server.py:6382-6386 — INGREDIENT_MACROS contains 'extra lean beef mince' (153,25,0,6), 'lean beef mince' (170,26,0,8), plus 'extra lean ground beef' & 'lean ground beef' aliases. Original 'beef mince' 20% (250,26,0,17) also present as fallback.
server.py:6315 — ELITE STANDARDS Rule 6 'All meat, fish and grain quantities are COOKED weights — never raw' present.
meal-detail.tsx:428 — Rotation hint text updated to include cooked-weight note (verified live).
meal-questionnaire.tsx:347-359 — Modal loading overlay renders correctly with pulseAnim, cycling loadingMessage every 3s and dark 85% overlay. Message cycling verified at 1s, 4.3s, 7.8s marks.
seed_data_creation: Created test users via signup UI (beefy{ts}@example.com) and upgraded subscription_status to 'complimentary' via mongosh so the meal-plan gate would pass. No changes to production/seed users.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 changes from this iteration are verified. If retesting, run pytest /app/backend/tests/test_beef_mince_preferred_foods.py -v. For frontend: the meal-plan gate requires premium; either use an admin (sebastianrush5@gmail.com) or run mongosh 'db.profiles.updateOne({email:<email>}, {$set:{subscription_status:"complimentary"}})' after signup. Live plan id from this run: 64aac10c-fe34-4c7a-a3a8-cc4140464668.
